"I only help send 10 people a year to their deaths" is not the genius defense you think it is https://t.co/1XXjSoHtBv
@OrenYaniv Of all the questions this is the one that's too difficult for a comms director to answer lol

@OrenYaniv Got it. Last question- what percentage of the total Rikers population would have to die annually for you to decide to stop sending people there? 1% would be ~110 a year, right? Too few still? Where do you draw the line?
@OrenYaniv Why did you bring up violent and sexual offenders?
@OrenYaniv I guess I misunderstood your point. Would love clarification. Is it or is it not manslaughter if your actions result in someone else’s death, even if they are violent or a sexual offender?
@OrenYaniv So you are saying that the existence of violent and sexual offenders within a population means that we should ignore if they are tortured and killed by preventable conditions?
